title: The Practice — Red Team Business Plan
prerequisites: Advanced Offensive Track - Mastery Tier Access
learning_objectives: Market analysis for Southern African cybersecurity services
Service catalog design with tiered offerings and SLAs
Professional engagement templates and pricing models
Team structure and hiring pipeline planning
scenario: This Mastery mission requires professional-grade execution in Southern African cybersecurity services market. Challenge: Develop complete red team business plan: market analysis, service design, financials, go-to-market strategy. Relevance: OCH graduates launch professional red team practices serving pan-African enterprises and governments

scenario_context.challenge: Develop complete red team business plan: market analysis, service design, financials, go-to-market strategy
scenario_context.relevance: OCH graduates launch professional red team practices serving pan-African enterprises and governments

subtasks.title: Market Analysis
subtasks.description: Southern African cybersecurity market: demand, competitors, pricing.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Research Southern African cybersecurity market:
        - Market size and growth rates
        - Competitive landscape: Who else offers red team services?
        - Buyer personas: Who buys red team assessments?
        - Pricing trends: What do assessments cost?
        - Regional considerations: SADC, WAEMU, East Africa

        Deliver: Market analysis with data-supported insights.

subtasks.title: Service Catalog Design
subtasks.description: Offerings, deliverables, SLAs, pricing per tier.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Define service offerings:
        - Standard Red Team Assessment (scope, duration, cost)
        - Targeted Assessment (specific systems, lower cost)
        - OT-focused Assessment (specialized, premium)
        - Mentorship/Training (team capability building)
        - SLAs: Response times, report delivery, support

        Deliver: Service catalog with pricing and SLA details.

subtasks.title: Engagement Templates
subtasks.description: Proposal, engagement letter, ROE, report, exec presentation.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Develop professional templates:
        1. Proposal: How to pitch red team services
        2. Engagement letter: Legal agreement and terms
        3. Rules of Engagement: Scope and limitations
        4. Report template: How to present findings
        5. Executive presentation: C-suite communication

        Deliver: 5 professional documents ready for use.

subtasks.title: Team & Operations Plan
subtasks.description: Structure, hiring, training pipeline, operational procedures.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Plan organizational structure:
        - Founder/lead role and responsibilities
        - Operator team: Skills matrix and hiring
        - Growth trajectory: Year 1-3 team expansion
        - Training and development: How to develop staff
        - Operational procedures: Workflows and approvals

        Deliver: Team plan with org chart and growth projections.
subtasks.evidence_required: Team plan with org chart + growth projections

subtasks.title: Financial Model
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Develop 3-year financial projections:
        - Revenue model: Pricing strategy and volume
        - Cost structure: Salaries, infrastructure, overhead
        - Profitability: EBITDA and margins by year
        - Break-even analysis: When does business become profitable?
        - Cash flow: Monthly projections

        Deliver: Financial model with documented assumptions.

subtasks.title: Go-to-Market Strategy
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Plan market entry:
        - Target market: Which companies/industries first?
        - Sales strategy: How to find and close first 10 clients
        - Partnerships: Industry partnerships and channels
        - Marketing: Branding and awareness building
        - Positioning: Your unique value proposition
        - 90-day action plan: Specific steps to launch

        Deliver: GTM strategy with 90-day action plan.

resources.title: Mission Overview: The Practice — Red Team Business Plan

reflection_prompt: What competitive advantages would a pan-African red team have versus foreign competitors? How would you structure pricing for African enterprises with different budgets and maturity levels?

quiz.question: When developing a red team business plan for Southern African markets, what is the primary competitive advantage of local operators versus international firms?
options: International firms are always more capable
Local operators understand regional infrastructure, legal frameworks, client relationships, and threat landscapes—enabling targeted service delivery and client trust
Competitive advantage doesn't matter in cybersecurity
Price is the only factor clients consider
quiz.explanation: Local African red teams understand regional context: enterprise maturity, infrastructure patterns, regulatory environment, and threat actors. This enables better threat modeling, relevant service design, and client relationships that international competitors struggle to establish.

quiz.question: In your go-to-market strategy for pan-African red team services, what distinguishes your approach to the first 10 clients?
options: Strategic selection of early adopters that will provide references, case studies, and operating capital for scaling—typically progressive enterprises and government agencies
All clients are equally important in the first phase
Go-to-market strategy doesn't matter for technical services
quiz.explanation: Strategic client selection matters critically for new red team practices. First clients should be progressive organizations that will value your capabilities, provide references and testimonials, and generate revenue for sustainable scaling. Regional government agencies and forward-thinking enterprises are ideal early targets.

portfolio_artifacts: Evidence of technical excellence and strategic thinking
mentor_notes:
This Mastery mission requires senior mentor review. Candidates must demonstrate:
- Professional-grade execution and documentation
- Deep understanding of African organizational and threat contexts
- Strategic thinking beyond tactical execution
- Readiness for commercial red team operations
- Leadership potential within OCH and broader community

Successful completion positions candidate for Mastery portfolio and professional practice.
